== Notes for [[Item:Q1939|Q1939]] ==

{geni:about_me} Rishi Marichi or Mareechi or Marishi (ṛṣi Marīci, ऋषि मरीचि) (meaning a ray of light) is the son of Brahma, the cosmic creator, and also one of the Saptarshi (Seven Great Sages Rishi), in the First Manvantara, with others being Atri, Angiras, Pulaha, Kratu, Pulastya, and Vashishtha
<p>===Family </p>
<p>*Parents Brahma (father), Saraswati (mother)</p>
<p>*Spouse Kala</p>
<p>*Children Kashyapa</p>
<p>http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Marichi</p>

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
